title: senecio × orarius
intro: Senecio × orarius, also known as the hybrid Jerusalem sage, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio × orarius include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Senecio × orarius typically involve infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
